name: @ylcc/wasm-blitz
description: Experimental headless buffer-surface API for Blitz

scripts.build:ts: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ../../scripts/fixup-native-dts.cjs dist/native.d.ts
scripts.build:native: napi build --platform --release --strip --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml --no-default-features --features buffer-surface --package-json-path package.json --output-dir native --js index.js --dts index.d.ts
scripts.build:native:debug: napi build --platform --strip --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml --no-default-features --features buffer-surface --package-json-path package.json --output-dir native --js index.js --dts index.d.ts
